_about: Kritical Codex Pack — the additive overlay that 'flies over the top' of stock OpenAI Codex. HR29: additive only. It NEVER edits upstream codex files, so `codex` self-updates and the source clone `git pull`s with zero conflict. Applying = putting Kritical shims on PATH + registering the wrapper. Removing = deleting shims + restoring PATH. Nothing here touches ~/.codex/auth.json, config.toml model, or ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.

shims.name: kcodex.cmd
shims.desc: SCX-routed codex (falls back to stock codex when proxy down)
